# QLThumbnailRepresentation.RepresentationType.icon

**Case**

A file icon representation of an image.

## Declaration

```swift
case icon
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **QLThumbnailRepresentation.RepresentationType.lowQualityThumbnail**: A cached thumbnail representation of an image.
- **QLThumbnailRepresentation.RepresentationType.thumbnail**: A thumbnail representation of an image.
